---
title: "基于克里金法的足球球权热图及价值建模完整代码"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
---

# 零、 全局环境与配置初始化

```{r,eval=FALSE}
dir.create("data", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("output_figures", showWarnings = FALSE)

# 包加载
library(StatsBombR)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gstat)
library(sp)
library(showtext)

# 字体渲染
showtext_auto()

# 颜色卡与断点设定 (全局生效)
my_breaks <- c(-Inf, 0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 15, Inf)
my_colors <- c(
  "midnightblue",  # < 0 分 (失误区域)
  "blue",          # 0 - 2 分 (后场常规传导)
  "dodgerblue",    # 2 - 4 分 (中场过渡)
  "cyan",          # 4 - 6 分 (前场推进)
  "greenyellow",   # 6 - 8 分 (进入威胁区)
  "yellow",        # 8 - 10 分 (关键传球区)
  "orange",        # 10 - 12 分 (射门边缘)
  "red",           # 12 - 15 分 (高危射门区)
  "darkred"        # > 15 分 (绝对得分机会/角球)
)

# 差异图色卡 (红优蓝劣)
diff_breaks <- c(-Inf, -3, -1, 0, 1, 3, Inf)
diff_colors <- c("darkblue", "blue", "lightblue", "lightcoral", "red", "darkred")

# 4. 封装全局足球场绘制函数
create_pitch_plot <- function(kriging_df, title_text, subtitle_text, save_path) {
  p <- ggplot(kriging_df, aes(x = x, y = y, z = var1.pred)) +
    geom_contour_filled(breaks = my_breaks) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors, name = "战术价值 Z", guide = guide_colorsteps(show.limits = TRUE)) +
    
    # 球场辅助线
    annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=120, ymin=0, ymax=80, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
    annotate("segment", x=60, xend=60, y=0, yend=80, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
    annotate("point", x=60, y=40, color="black", size=1.5) +
    annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=18, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
    annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=6, ymin=30, ymax=50, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
    annotate("point", x=12, y=40, color="black", size=1) +
    annotate("segment", x=0, xend=0, y=36, yend=44, color="black", linewidth=1.5) +
    annotate("rect", xmin=102, xmax=120, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
    annotate("rect", xmin=114, xmax=120, ymin=30, ymax=50, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
    annotate("point", x=108, y=40, color="black", size=1) +
    annotate("segment", x=120, xend=120, y=36, yend=44, color="black", linewidth=1.5) +
    
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1, xlim = c(-1, 121), ylim = c(-1, 81), expand = FALSE) +
    theme_void() + 
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 32, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(t=5, b = 5)),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey20", margin = margin(b = 10)),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.8, "cm"), 
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10) 
    ) +
    labs(title = title_text, subtitle = subtitle_text)
  
  ggsave(save_path, plot = p, width = 5, height = 4, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg="white")
  return(p)
}
```

# 一、数据获取与清洗预处理
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# 抓取全赛季数据 (如果本地没有数据则自动抓取，已有则直接读取)
if(!file.exists("data/Bundesliga_1516_AllEvents.rds")) {
  print("本地未发现数据，正在从 StatsBomb API 抓取德甲 15/16 数据...")
  comp <- FreeCompetitions() %>% filter(competition_name == "1. Bundesliga", season_name == "2015/2016")
  matches <- FreeMatches(comp)
  all_events_list <- list()
  for(i in 1:nrow(matches)) {
    tryCatch({
      temp_events <- get.matchFree(matches[i,])
      all_events_list[[i]] <- temp_events
    }, error = function(e) { print(paste("第", i, "场抓取失败跳过")) })
  }
  all_1516_events <- bind_rows(all_events_list)
  saveRDS(all_1516_events, "data/Bundesliga_1516_AllEvents.rds")
} else {
  print("从本地读取全赛季原始数据...")
  all_1516_events <- readRDS("data/Bundesliga_1516_AllEvents.rds")
}

# 扁平化清洗流
full_season_cleaned <- all_1516_events %>%
  allclean() %>% 
  filter(!type.name %in% c("Starting XI", "Half Start", "Half End")) %>%
  mutate(under_pressure = replace_na(under_pressure, FALSE)) %>%
  select(
    id, match_id, minute, second, team.name, player.name, position.name, 
    location.x, location.y, type.id, type.name, under_pressure, 
    starts_with("pass.height"), pass.type.name, pass.shot_assist, 
    dribble.outcome.name, pass.outcome.name
  ) %>%
  arrange(match_id, minute, second)

write.csv(full_season_cleaned, "data/Bundesliga_1516_Events.csv", row.names = FALSE)
print(paste("清洗完毕，总行数:", nrow(full_season_cleaned)))
```


# 二、探索性数据分析 (EDA) - 为 Z 模型参数找依据
## 1. 射门密度图

```{r,eval=FALSE}
shots_data <- full_season_cleaned %>% filter(type.name == "Shot")
p_shot <- ggplot(shots_data, aes(x = location.x, y = location.y)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = -1, xmax = 121, ymin = -1, ymax = 81, fill = "white") +
  stat_density_2d(aes(fill = ..level..), geom = "polygon", color = NA, linewidth = 0, bins = 30) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = "密度") +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=120, ymin=0, ymax=80, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("segment", x=60, xend=60, y=0, yend=80, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=60, y=40, color="grey40", size=1.5) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=18, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=102, xmax=120, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1, xlim = c(-1, 121), ylim = c(-1, 81), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 32, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey30"),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)) +
  labs(title = "德甲 15/16 赛季射门密度", subtitle = "高密度区集中于禁区中路")
ggsave("output_figures/EDA_射门密度分布.png", plot = p_shot, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 300, bg="white")
```

## 2. 压力失误率对比
```{r,eval=FALSE}
pressure_stats <- full_season_cleaned %>%
  mutate(is_error = ifelse(type.name %in% c("Miscontrol", "Dispossessed"), 1, 0)) %>%
  group_by(under_pressure) %>%
  summarise(total_actions = n(), error_count = sum(is_error), error_rate = error_count / total_actions) %>%
  mutate(under_pressure = ifelse(under_pressure, "受压迫 (Pressure)", "无压迫 (Free)"))
p_pressure <- ggplot(pressure_stats, aes(x = under_pressure, y = error_rate, fill = under_pressure)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) + scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("受压迫 (Pressure)" = "#B22222", "无压迫 (Free)" = "#4682B4")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none", plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color=NA)) +
  labs(title = "不同防守压力下的失误率对比", x="", y="")
ggsave("output_figures/EDA_不同压力失误率对比.png", plot = p_pressure, width = 5, height = 3.8, dpi = 300, bg="white")
```

## 3. 定位球传球类型助攻率对比
```{r,eval=FALSE}
assist_stats <- full_season_cleaned %>% filter(type.name == "Pass") %>%
  mutate(pass_type = case_when(pass.type.name == "Corner" ~ "角球", pass.type.name == "Free Kick" ~ "任意球", TRUE ~ "运动战")) %>%
  group_by(pass_type) %>% summarise(total_passes = n(), shot_assists = sum(pass.shot_assist == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE), assist_rate = shot_assists / total_passes) %>%
  arrange(desc(assist_rate))
p_assist <- ggplot(assist_stats, aes(x = reorder(pass_type, -assist_rate), y = assist_rate, fill = pass_type)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) + scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "mako", begin = 0.3, end = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none", plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color=NA)) +
  labs(title = "不同传球类型的射门助攻率", x="", y="")
ggsave("output_figures/EDA_传球类型助攻率对比.png", plot = p_assist, width = 5, height = 3.8, dpi = 300, bg="white")
```

## 4. 传球高度失误率对比
```{r,eval=FALSE}
pass_height_stats <- full_season_cleaned %>% filter(type.name == "Pass", !is.na(pass.height.name)) %>%
  mutate(is_error = ifelse(!is.na(pass.outcome.name), 1, 0)) %>% group_by(pass.height.name) %>%
  summarise(total_passes = n(), error_count = sum(is_error), error_rate = error_count / total_passes) %>%
  mutate(pass.height.name = factor(pass.height.name, levels = c("Ground Pass", "Low Pass", "High Pass")))
p_height <- ggplot(pass_height_stats, aes(x = pass.height.name, y = error_rate, fill = pass.height.name)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) + scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Ground Pass" = "#4682B4", "Low Pass" = "#FFA500", "High Pass" = "#B22222")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none", plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color=NA)) +
  labs(title = "不同高度传球的失误率对比", x="", y="")
ggsave("output_figures/EDA_传球高度失误率对比.png", plot = p_height, width = 5, height = 3.8, dpi = 300, bg="white")
```

# 三、战术价值 Z 模型的计算与网格化聚合
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# 计算合成最终价值 Z
def_types <- c("Goal Keeper", "Clearance", "Block", "Interception", "Ball Recovery", "Pressure", "Duel", "Shield", "Foul Committed")
error_types <- c("Miscontrol", "Dispossessed", "Dribbled Past", "Own Goal Against")

final_model_data <- full_season_cleaned %>%
  mutate(
    custom_type = case_when(
      type.name == "Pass" & pass.type.name == "Corner" ~ "Corner",
      type.name == "Pass" & pass.type.name == "Free Kick" ~ "Free Kick",
      TRUE ~ type.name
    ),
    centrality_score = 1 - (abs(location.y - 40) / 40),
    s_base = case_when(
      custom_type %in% c("Shot", "Goal Keeper") ~ 10,
      custom_type == "Corner" ~ 7, 
      custom_type == "Free Kick" ~ 6,
      type.name == "Pass" & pass.shot_assist == TRUE ~ 8,
      custom_type %in% c("Clearance", "Block") ~ 8,
      custom_type %in% c("Interception", "Ball Recovery", "Foul Won") ~ 6,
      custom_type == "Dribble" & dribble.outcome.name == "Complete" ~ 6,
      custom_type %in% c("Duel", "Pressure", "Shield") ~ 4,
      custom_type %in% c("Pass", "Carry", "Ball Receipt*") ~ 1,
      custom_type %in% error_types ~ -3,
      TRUE ~ 1
    ),
    w_space = case_when(
      custom_type == "Corner" ~ 2.5,
      custom_type == "Free Kick" ~ 2.0,
      custom_type %in% error_types ~ 0.5,
      custom_type %in% def_types ~ 1 + ((120 - location.x) / 120) + (0.5 * centrality_score),
      TRUE ~ 1 + (location.x / 120) + (0.5 * centrality_score)
    ),
    c_pressure = ifelse(under_pressure == TRUE, 1.5, 1.0),
    q_height = case_when(
      type.name == "Pass" & pass.height.name == "High Pass" ~ 0.8,
      type.name == "Pass" & pass.height.name == "Low Pass" ~ 0.9,
      TRUE ~ 1.0
    ),
    value_z = s_base * w_space * c_pressure * q_height
  ) %>% filter(!is.na(value_z))

# 空间网格聚合 (1x1米)
grid_data <- final_model_data %>%
  mutate(grid_x = round(location.x), grid_y = round(location.y)) %>%
  group_by(grid_x, grid_y) %>%
  summarise(avg_z = mean(value_z, na.rm = TRUE), count = n(), .groups = "drop")

```


#四、变异函数拟合与模型交叉验证 (LOOCV)
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# 拟合实验与理论变异函数 (OK)
train_sp <- grid_data
coordinates(train_sp) <- ~grid_x + grid_y
v_emp <- variogram(avg_z ~ 1, train_sp, width = 2, cutoff = 60)
v_model_fitted <- fit.variogram(v_emp, vgm(psill = var(grid_data$avg_z), "Exp", range = 20, nugget = 1))

png("output_figures/Model_变异函数拟合图.png", width = 6, height = 5, units = "in", res = 300)
plot(v_emp, v_model_fitted, main = "德甲球权价值空间变异函数 (Variogram Fit)")
dev.off() 
print("变异函数参数：")
print(v_model_fitted)

# 全场标准化预测基底
pred_grid <- expand.grid(x = 1:120, y = 1:80)
coordinates(pred_grid) <- ~x + y
gridded(pred_grid) <- TRUE

# 5折交叉验证评估与残差直方图
print("正在执行 5 折留一交叉验证 (LOOCV)...")
cv_results <- krige.cv(avg_z ~ 1, train_sp, model = v_model_fitted, nfold = 5, nmax = 50)

cv_df <- data.frame(Observed = cv_results$observed, Predicted = cv_results$var1.pred, Residuals = cv_results$residual)
p_cv_hist <- ggplot(cv_df, aes(x = Residuals)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), bins = 40, fill = "lightblue", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_function(fun = dnorm, args = list(mean = mean(cv_df$Residuals), sd = sd(cv_df$Residuals)), color = "darkred", linewidth = 1.2) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill="white", color=NA), panel.background = element_rect(fill="white", color=NA)) +
  labs(title = "克里金插值预测残差分布", subtitle="红线为理论正态分布曲线", x = "预测残差", y = "密度")
ggsave("output_figures/Model_残差分布直方图.png", plot = p_cv_hist, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg="white")
```

# 五、宏观分析：全联盟大盘与拜仁战术溢价实证
## 1.KDE 与 OK 基准场宏观对比
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# 全联盟 KDE 场
p_kde_league <- ggplot(final_model_data, aes(x = location.x, y = location.y)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = -1, xmax = 121, ymin = -1, ymax = 81, fill = "white") +
  stat_density_2d(aes(fill = ..level..), geom = "polygon", color = NA, linewidth = 0, bins = 15) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = "触球频率") +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=120, ymin=0, ymax=80, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("segment", x=60, xend=60, y=0, yend=80, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=60, y=40, color="grey40", size=1.5) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=18, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=6, ymin=30, ymax=50, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=12, y=40, color="grey40", size=1) +
  annotate("segment", x=0, xend=0, y=36, yend=44, color="grey40", linewidth=1.5) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=102, xmax=120, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=114, xmax=120, ymin=30, ymax=50, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=108, y=40, color="grey40", size=1) +
  annotate("segment", x=120, xend=120, y=36, yend=44, color="grey40", linewidth=1.5) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1, xlim = c(-1, 121), ylim = c(-1, 81), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(t=5, b=5)),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey30", margin = margin(b=10)),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)) +
  labs(title = "德甲全联盟 KDE 触球频率场", subtitle = "海量数据淤积于中后场安全倒脚区")
ggsave("output_figures/Macro_全联盟_KDE基准场.png", plot = p_kde_league, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 300, bg="white")

# 全联盟克里金 (OK) 场
kriging_res <- krige(avg_z ~ 1, locations = train_sp, newdata = pred_grid, model = v_model_fitted, nmax = 50)
kriging_df <- as.data.frame(kriging_res)
create_pitch_plot(kriging_df, "德甲全联盟战术价值基准场", "普通克里金平滑推演全域红利区", "output_figures/Macro_全联盟_OK基准场.png")
```

```{r,eval=FALSE}
# 提取拜仁数据
bayern_base <- final_model_data %>% filter(team.name == "Bayern Munich") %>% 
  mutate(grid_x = round(location.x), grid_y = round(location.y)) %>%
  group_by(grid_x, grid_y) %>% summarise(avg_z = mean(value_z, na.rm = TRUE), count = n(), .groups = "drop")
bayern_sp <- bayern_base
coordinates(bayern_sp) <- ~grid_x + grid_y

# 拜仁插值推演
bayern_krige <- krige(avg_z ~ 1, locations = bayern_sp, newdata = pred_grid, model = v_model_fitted, nmax = 50)
bayern_df <- as.data.frame(bayern_krige)
colnames(bayern_df)[which(names(bayern_df) == "grid_x")] <- "x"
colnames(bayern_df)[which(names(bayern_df) == "grid_y")] <- "y"

# 保存拜仁单队表现图
create_pitch_plot(bayern_df, "拜仁单队战术价值场", "统一基准色阶下的战术侧重表现", "output_figures/Macro_拜仁_单队表现场.png")

# 计算残差并绘制差异图
diff_df <- bayern_df
diff_df$diff_z <- bayern_df$var1.pred - kriging_df$var1.pred

p_diff <- ggplot(diff_df, aes(x = x, y = y, z = diff_z)) +
  geom_contour_filled(breaks = diff_breaks) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = diff_colors, name = "价值溢价", guide = guide_colorsteps(show.limits = TRUE)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=120, ymin=0, ymax=80, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("segment", x=60, xend=60, y=0, yend=80, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=60, y=40, color="black", size=1.5) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=18, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=6, ymin=30, ymax=50, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=12, y=40, color="black", size=1) +
  annotate("segment", x=0, xend=0, y=36, yend=44, color="black", linewidth=1.5) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=102, xmax=120, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=114, xmax=120, ymin=30, ymax=50, fill=NA, color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=108, y=40, color="black", size=1) +
  annotate("segment", x=120, xend=120, y=36, yend=44, color="black", linewidth=1.5) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1, xlim = c(-1, 121), ylim = c(-1, 81), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 32, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(t=5, b = 5)),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey20", margin = margin(b = 10)),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)) +
  labs(title = "拜仁慕尼黑战术差异图", subtitle = "红区表溢价强于联盟均值，蓝区表劣势")
ggsave("output_figures/Macro_拜仁_差异图.png", plot = p_diff, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 300, bg="white")
```

## 1.泛克里金 (UK) 与普通克里金OK基准模型对比
```{r,eval=FALSE}
pred_grid_uk <- expand.grid(grid_x = 1:120, grid_y = 1:80)
coordinates(pred_grid_uk) <- ~grid_x + grid_y
gridded(pred_grid_uk) <- TRUE

# 拟合泛克里金的变异函数 (加入 X 和 Y 的线性全局趋势)
v_emp_uk <- variogram(avg_z ~ grid_x + grid_y, train_sp, width = 2, cutoff = 60)
v_model_fitted_uk <- fit.variogram(v_emp_uk, vgm(psill = var(train_sp$avg_z), "Exp", range = 20, nugget = 1))

# 泛克里金 5折交叉验证 (LOOCV)
cv_results_uk <- krige.cv(avg_z ~ grid_x + grid_y, train_sp, model = v_model_fitted_uk, nfold = 5, nmax = 50)

print("====== 泛克里金 (UK) 交叉验证结果 (备用核对) ======")
print(sprintf("均方根误差 (RMSE): %.4f", sqrt(mean(cv_results_uk$residual^2))))
print(sprintf("标准化均方误差 (MSDR): %.4f", mean(cv_results_uk$zscore^2)))
print(sprintf("平均绝对误差 (MAE): %.4f", mean(abs(cv_results_uk$residual))))
print(sprintf("平均误差 (ME): %.4f", mean(cv_results_uk$residual)))
print(sprintf("预测相关系数 (R): %.4f", cor(cv_results_uk$observed, cv_results_uk$var1.pred)))
print("==================================================")

# 泛克里金插值全场预测
kriging_res_uk <- krige(avg_z ~ grid_x + grid_y, locations = train_sp, newdata = pred_grid_uk, model = v_model_fitted_uk, nmax = 50)
kriging_df_uk <- as.data.frame(kriging_res_uk)

# 把列名改回 x 和 y 以适配封装好的画图函数
colnames(kriging_df_uk)[which(names(kriging_df_uk) == "grid_x")] <- "x"
colnames(kriging_df_uk)[which(names(kriging_df_uk) == "grid_y")] <- "y"

create_pitch_plot(
  kriging_df_uk, 
  "泛克里金(UK)战术价值场", 
  "引入全局坐标漂移后的强制平滑", 
  "output_figures/Macro_全联盟_UK基准场.png"
)
```


# 六、微观极限鲁棒性测试：拜仁单场 KDE vs OK
```{r,eval=FALSE}
target_match <- final_model_data %>% filter(team.name == "Bayern Munich") %>% pull(match_id) %>% unique() %>% .[1]
single_match_data <- final_model_data %>% filter(match_id == target_match, team.name == "Bayern Munich")

# 单场 KDE
p_kde_single <- ggplot(single_match_data, aes(x = location.x, y = location.y)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = -1, xmax = 121, ymin = -1, ymax = 81, fill = "white") +
  stat_density_2d(aes(fill = ..level..), geom = "polygon", color = NA, linewidth = 0, bins = 15) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = "触球频率") +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=120, ymin=0, ymax=80, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("segment", x=60, xend=60, y=0, yend=80, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=60, y=40, color="grey40", size=1.5) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=18, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=0, xmax=6, ymin=30, ymax=50, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=12, y=40, color="grey40", size=1) +
  annotate("segment", x=0, xend=0, y=36, yend=44, color="grey40", linewidth=1.5) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=102, xmax=120, ymin=18, ymax=62, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=114, xmax=120, ymin=30, ymax=50, fill=NA, color="grey40", linewidth=0.3) +
  annotate("point", x=108, y=40, color="grey40", size=1) +
  annotate("segment", x=120, xend=120, y=36, yend=44, color="grey40", linewidth=1.5) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1, xlim = c(-1, 121), ylim = c(-1, 81), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(t=5, b=5)),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey30", margin = margin(b=10)),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)) +
  labs(title = "拜仁单场 KDE 频率图", subtitle = "样本稀疏导致热区碎裂且陷入后场倒脚区")
ggsave("output_figures/Micro_拜仁单场_KDE对比图.png", plot = p_kde_single, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 300, bg="white")

# 单场克里金
single_sp <- single_match_data %>% mutate(grid_x = round(location.x), grid_y = round(location.y)) %>% group_by(grid_x, grid_y) %>% summarise(avg_z = mean(value_z, na.rm = TRUE), count = n(), .groups = "drop")
coordinates(single_sp) <- ~grid_x + grid_y

single_krige <- krige(avg_z ~ 1, locations = single_sp, newdata = pred_grid, model = v_model_fitted, nmax = 50)
single_df <- as.data.frame(single_krige)
colnames(single_df)[which(names(single_df) == "grid_x")] <- "x"
colnames(single_df)[which(names(single_df) == "grid_y")] <- "y"
create_pitch_plot(single_df, "拜仁单场克里金价值场", "依托先验结构，平滑还原单场威胁区", "output_figures/Micro_拜仁单场_OK对比图.png")
```


# 七、球员个人实证分析：空间过滤与战术质心提取
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# 封装单一球员处理流 (包含提取、未过滤出图、频次过滤出图)
process_player_kriging <- function(player_string, cn_name, position_desc) {
  # 提取基础数据
  player_base <- final_model_data %>% filter(player.name == player_string) %>% 
    mutate(grid_x = round(location.x), grid_y = round(location.y)) %>%
    group_by(grid_x, grid_y) %>% summarise(avg_z = mean(value_z, na.rm = TRUE), count = n(), .groups = "drop")
  
  # 未过滤场
  sp_raw <- player_base
  coordinates(sp_raw) <- ~grid_x + grid_y
  df_raw <- as.data.frame(krige(avg_z ~ 1, locations = sp_raw, newdata = pred_grid, model = v_model_fitted, nmax = 50))
  colnames(df_raw)[which(names(df_raw) == "grid_x")] <- "x"
  colnames(df_raw)[which(names(df_raw) == "grid_y")] <- "y"
  create_pitch_plot(df_raw, paste0(cn_name, "战术价值场 (未过滤)"), "未过滤低频异常波动点", paste0("output_figures/Player_", cn_name, "_未过滤.png"))
  
  # 频次过滤场 (过滤掉只触球过1-2次的网格，提纯常态表现)
  sp_filt <- player_base %>% filter(count >= 3)
  coordinates(sp_filt) <- ~grid_x + grid_y
  df_filt <- as.data.frame(krige(avg_z ~ 1, locations = sp_filt, newdata = pred_grid, model = v_model_fitted, nmax = 50))
  colnames(df_filt)[which(names(df_filt) == "grid_x")] <- "x"
  colnames(df_filt)[which(names(df_filt) == "grid_y")] <- "y"
  create_pitch_plot(df_filt, paste0(cn_name, "战术价值场 (频次≥3)"), position_desc, paste0("output_figures/Player_", cn_name, "_已过滤.png"))
  
  return(df_filt)
}
```


```{r,eval=FALSE}
# 批量执行出图并捕获过滤后的数据用于计算度量
mkhi_df <- process_player_kriging("Henrikh Mkhitaryan", "姆希塔良", "还原前场核心真实的进攻走廊覆盖")
auba_df <- process_player_kriging("Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang", "奥巴梅扬", "极致收敛于禁区核心的纯粹终结者")
weigl_df <- process_player_kriging("Julian Weigl", "魏格尔", "拖后组织核心精准覆盖中场过渡带")
hummels_df <- process_player_kriging("Mats Hummels", "胡梅尔斯", "防线统帅纵贯本方半场的出球热区")

# ==========================================
# 空间特征量化表导出
# ==========================================
calculate_spatial_metrics <- function(player_df, player_name) {
  player_df %>%
    summarise(
      Player = player_name,
      Centroid_X = sum(x * ifelse(var1.pred > 0, var1.pred, 0)) / sum(ifelse(var1.pred > 0, var1.pred, 0)),
      Centroid_Y = sum(y * ifelse(var1.pred > 0, var1.pred, 0)) / sum(ifelse(var1.pred > 0, var1.pred, 0)),
      High_Threat_Area_sqm = sum(var1.pred > 8),
      Zone14_Value = sum(ifelse(x >= 80 & x <= 100 & y >= 30 & y <= 50, var1.pred, 0))
    )
}

metrics_table <- bind_rows(
  calculate_spatial_metrics(mkhi_df, "姆希塔良 (前腰)"),
  calculate_spatial_metrics(auba_df, "奥巴梅扬 (前锋)"),
  calculate_spatial_metrics(weigl_df, "魏格尔 (后腰)"),
  calculate_spatial_metrics(hummels_df, "胡梅尔斯 (中卫)")
) %>% mutate(Centroid_X = round(Centroid_X, 1), Centroid_Y = round(Centroid_Y, 1), Zone14_Value = round(Zone14_Value, 0))

write.csv(metrics_table, "output_figures/Player_核心球员空间量化对比表.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
